.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions checkout action from v3 to v4 to align with modern workflow standards.
Update Advanced Security Policy as Code action from v2.4.1 to v2.7.2.
Add workflow_dispatch trigger to allow manual execution with a version input for image tagging.
Define environment variables for Maven project root and build target to standardize paths.
Add a dedicated build job to run tests and install the application using Maven.
.github/workflows/build.yaml.after:
build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Build and test the application
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 21
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '21'
          distribution: 'temurin'
          
      - name: test
        working-directory: ${{ env.MVN_PROJECT_ROOT }}
        run: mvn test
        
      - name: build
        working-directory: ${{ env.MVN_PROJECT_ROOT }}
        run: mvn install

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Add artifact archiving step to save build outputs for subsequent jobs.
.github/workflows/build.yaml.after:
- name: Archive artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ${{ env.MVN_BUILD_TARGET }}

.github/workflows/build.yaml.general_idea: Add a job to build and push a Docker image to GitHub Container Registry (GHCR).
.github/workflows/build.yaml.after:
build-and-push-image-to-ghcr:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: ${{ env.MVN_BUILD_TARGET }}

      - name: Set up QEMU
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata (tags, labels) for Docker
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}},value=${{ inputs.version }},enable=${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}

      - name: Build and push untested Docker image to GHCR
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: ${{ env.MVN_PROJECT_ROOT }}
          push: ${{ github.event.inputs.version != '' }}
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.5 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add Spring Security starter dependency to enable security features.
Add Spring OAuth2 Resource Server starter dependency for JWT/OAuth2 support.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Flyway PostgreSQL database plugin dependency for migrations.
Add ModelMapper dependency for object mapping.
Add Logstash Logback Encoder dependency for structured logging.
Add Spring Security Test dependency for security-related unit tests.
Remove duplicate SpringDoc OpenAPI starter dependency.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove unused CommandLineRunner implementation and associated ExitCodeGenerator logic from the main application class.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.before: public class KitaFinderEaiApplication implements CommandLineRunner { ... run(String... arg0) ... class ExitException ... }

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Remove redundant explicit ComponentScan annotation since the default scan path covers the package.
Remove unused imports for CommandLineRunner, ExitCodeGenerator, and ComponentScan.
Remove unused java.io.IOException import that was only needed for the previous stub implementation.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper with org.modelmapper.ModelMapper for object mapping.
Add new service and model imports required for the implemented business logic.
Add Spring Security and Swagger security annotation imports for endpoint protection and documentation.
Add import for custom error response class used in API documentation.
Add import for SecurityConfiguration to reference scope constants.
Add import for java.util.Set used in validation error handling.
Add @CrossOrigin annotation to enable CORS for the controller.
Add @PreAuthorize annotation to enforce role-based access control on the controller.
Add @SecurityRequirement annotation to document required OAuth2 scopes in Swagger UI.
Define a constant for the path variable name to improve code maintainability.
Inject KitaFinderService to fetch data from the external KitaFinder system.
Inject ModelMapper to replace manual JSON parsing with object mapping.
Inject AuditService to log request/response details for auditing purposes.
Replace ObjectMapper injection with Validator injection for input validation.
Update Swagger @ApiResponses to include 204, 422, and specific error response schemas.
Update Swagger @Operation tag from 'kinder' to 'kita-app' and refine summary/description.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.before:
@Operation(tags = {
            "kinder" }, summary = "Liefert Kinddaten", description = "Liefert Kinddaten einer Einrichtung anhand der kibigWebId in Gruppen gruppiert.", operationId = "getGroupsWithKidsByKibigwebid")
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.after:
@Operation(tags = {
            "kita-app" }, summary = "Liefert Kinddaten", description = "Liefert in Gruppen aufgeteilte Kinddaten einer Einrichtung anhand der kibigWebId.", operationId = "getGroupsWithKidsByKibigwebid")

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Use the defined constant for the @PathVariable name instead of a hardcoded string.
Replace stub JSON parsing implementation with actual service call, mapping, validation, and auditing logic.
Correct a typo in a code comment to match the actual field name.
Update API documentation to reflect that the parents list no longer includes 'ABW' (authorized representatives).
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.before: @Schema(description = "Array mit Sorgeberechtigten für das Kind. Liste wird aus SB1, SB2 und ABW berechnet.")
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.after: @Schema(description = "Array mit Sorgeberechtigten für das Kind. Liste wird aus SB1 und SB2 berechnet.")

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Initialize the children collection to an empty ArrayList to prevent NullPointerExceptions when accessing the field.
src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.why_exists: Runtime NullPointerException if code attempts to iterate or add to the null children collection.

src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Add @Valid annotation to enable recursive validation of the nested Child objects within the Group.
Rename field 'intituteName' to 'instituteName' to fix a typo in the class member name.
Add @Valid annotation to the groups collection to enable cascading validation for nested objects.
Change the visibility of the nested enum ParentType from package-private to public.
